name: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 16 oz. PHILADELPHIA BRAND Cream Cheese, Softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla waver crumbs and melted margarine in a 9-inch springform pan until well mixed. Press onto the bottom and 1 1/4 inches up the sides of the pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
2. Microwave the caramels and evaporated milk in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 1 1/2 minutes. Stir, then microwave for 1 minute longer. Stir until the caramels are completely melted and smooth.
3. Pour the caramel mixture into the crust.
4. Top with pecans.
5. Beat the softened cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla in a bowl until well blended. Add the eggs and beat well. Mix in the melted chocolate. Pour over the pecans.
6. Heat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 40 minutes or until firm. Cool on a wire rack. Cover; refrigerate. Garnish as desired.
